metadata.title: Cola de revisión manual - tabla maestra de alergia a betalactámicos
notes: Manual review queue created from deterministic source-check summary.
Rows in this file must not be automatically corrected or promoted.
The source checker detects drug-token presence only; it does not validate clinical correctness.

items.subsyndrome: Neumonía nosocomial o con FR MDR
items.manualReviewAction: Verify whether tigeciclina remains in the current HUVN source for this subsyndrome or whether the table row came from an outdated/incorrect extraction.
Verify whether fosfomicina sódica is present in the current HUVN endovascular source for ADVP alternative therapy or whether the table row requires correction/removal.

items.subsyndrome: Endocarditis asociada a dispositivos intracardiacos, alternativa
items.manualReviewAction: Verify whether fosfomicina sódica is present in the current HUVN endovascular source for device-associated endocarditis alternative therapy or whether the table row requires correction/removal.
